testcase.name: test_journal_post
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_430.py:104: in test_journal_post assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Expected 200/201, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200/201, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","title"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"content":"Test journal entry from iteration 430","mood":"peaceful","tags":["test","automation"]},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
